---
title: "Upcoming R/Pharma Hangouts"
description: |
  Join us for upcoming R/Pharma Hangouts featuring key innovators across the world of open source and life sciences.
comments: false

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
hangouts:
  - Date: "2026-03-17"
    Title: "Package Management"
    Guests: "Devin Pastoor, Shannon Pileggi & Kevin Ushey"
    Recording: "package_management"
  - Date: "2026-04-21"
    Title: "Open Telemetry"
    Guests: "Barret Schloerke"
    Recording: "shiny_otel"
  - Date: "2026-05-19"
    Title: "Containers (Nix) and Reproducibility"
    Guests: "Bruno Rodrigues"
    Recording: "rep_nix"
  - Date: "2026-06-16"
    Title: "ShinyMCP"
    Guests: "James Wade"
  - Date: "2026-07-21"
    Title: "pointblank"
    Guests: "Rich Iannone"
  - Date: "2026-08-18"
    Title: "ARD and ARS"
    Guests: "Daniel Sjoberg"
  - Date: "2026-09-15"
    Title: "Behavior-Driven Development"
    Guests: "Brian Repko & Jacub Sobolewski"
---

Each month R/Pharma brings you a live Hangout featuring key innovators across the world of open source and life sciences.  
Join us for upcoming R/Pharma Hangouts, and check out our [recordings](/docs/hangout/recordings) to catch up on past events.

Keep up to date with [LinkedIn events and announcements](https://www.linkedin.com/company/open-source-in-pharma/) for each Hangout and, if you have a topic or guest you'd like to see featured, please reach out to us at [info@rinpharma.com](mailto:info@rinpharma.com) or via our [contact form](/contact.qmd).

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
hangouts <- dplyr::bind_rows(rmarkdown::metadata$hangouts) |>
  dplyr::rowwise() |>
  dplyr::mutate(Recording = ifelse(is.na(Recording), "", as.character(
    shiny::tags$a(
      href = paste0("/docs/hangout/recordings/", Recording, "/"),
      class = "badge rounded-pill text-bg-danger d-inline-flex align-items-center gap-1 text-decoration-none",
      "Recording"
    )
  )))
knitr::kable(hangouts, escape = FALSE, format="html")
```

<style>
table {
  max-width: 900px !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
}
</style>
